title: eugenia axillaris
intro: Eugenia axillaris, also known as the Brazilian cherry or guanabara, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eugenia axillaris include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
